messages.author: Geebee
messages.text: Hope this is the right place. When adding users to the Access Control List on a Room Server on my T1000-e, the setperm command returns OK, but the ACL entry seems to be not persisted. Running 'get acl' immediately after returns an empty list. The same issue occurs when adding users via the MeshCore app's Access Control feature - I can add a user (and user can subsequently log in without a password), but when returning to the Access Control screen in the app, the user list is empty. Is this a known problem?
messages.content_html: Hope this is the right place. When adding users to the Access Control List on a Room Server on my T1000-e, the setperm command returns OK, but the ACL entry seems to be not persisted. Running 'get acl' immediately after returns an empty list. The same issue occurs when adding users via the MeshCore app's Access Control feature - I can add a user (and user can subsequently log in without a password), but when returning to the Access Control screen in the app, the user list is empty. Is this a known problem?
